Clematis alternata, also known as Mountain Clematis, is a flowering plant species in the Ranunculaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine, offering various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. The bioactive constituents of Clematis alternata include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made from Clematis alternata include teas, tinctures, and infusions, often used to calm the mind and soothe the nervous system.
